zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
/USD当前ADA/USD维持窄幅震荡后略偏强运行，价格站稳0.19上方，整体仍处于均线之上，短线结构偏多但动能有限，未形成单边突破趋势。

MACD柱状与DIFF维持正值，显示多头动能仍在延续，但信号线未给出，趋势确认度一般。价格明显高于20日均线0.1825，中期结构改善但仍需放量配合。

短线支撑关注0.1910及0.188区域，一旦失守可能回踩0.185附近；上方阻力集中在0.1939前高，突破后有望测试0.198至0.20整数关口。

交易策略上建议以回调低吸为主，等待支撑位企稳后分批布局；若放量突破0.1939可顺势跟进，否则维持区间震荡思路控制仓位风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano (ADA/USD) is currently trading in a mild short-term uptrend, holding above its 20-period SMA at 0.18252. Price action remains compressed near the upper end of the recent range, with the latest high at 0.193907 acting as immediate resistance. Despite a small 24-hour decline of -0.86%, structure remains constructive as higher lows are still being respected, suggesting consolidation rather than reversal at this stage.

Momentum indicators lean cautiously bullish. The MACD reading of 0.0055 above the zero line signals positive momentum, though the absence of a visible signal line value suggests confirmation is incomplete or lagging. With RSI unavailable, momentum must be inferred from price behavior and moving averages. The current positioning above the SMA(20) indicates buyers are maintaining short-term control, but conviction remains moderate rather than strong.

Immediate resistance is located between 0.1939 and 0.1950, where repeated rejection may trigger short-term pullbacks. A decisive breakout above this zone could open a path toward 0.205 and beyond. On the downside, initial support sits at the SMA(20) near 0.1825, followed by a stronger structural support zone around 0.1750–0.1780, where prior demand has previously stabilized price.

From a trading perspective, momentum continuation strategies favor long positions on pullbacks toward 0.1825 with tight risk control below 0.1780. Breakout traders may wait for a confirmed close above 0.1940 before entering continuation longs. Short positions are less favorable unless price clearly rejects resistance with rising volume and breaks below the SMA, signaling a potential shift back into range-bound or corrective conditions.
